name: Rep Rick Crawford
tweet: These men and women are absolute experts and are who we want at these scenes/in these situations when called for. They are going to be able to assist any/all law enforcement agencies with granular data to catch the person(s) who have done this

name: Rep Rick Crawford
tweet: It is my hope that when things like this happen, we will remember those who get these calls, that they are heading full steam ahead to the threat, hoping to render it inert, diffuse it, or, if called for, detonate without any possible collateral damage.

name: Rep Rick Crawford
tweet: May be dealing with.  They can also put on significant protective gear to guard themselves against a blast that would otherwise harm or potentially cause fatal injuries (see my previous tweets for pictures of these two examples)

name: Rep Rick Crawford
tweet: Depending on the description of the device and even if there isn’t much of a description, they can now deploy robotic equipment that can go inside to a scene/location and provide live video of what they...

name: Rep Rick Crawford
tweet: These experts who get these calls have a multitude of tools and resources now to assess the scene/device, more so than when I would join local law enforcement many years ago. We would have to get "eyes" on it directly to proceed

name: Rep Rick Crawford
tweet: We had to do all we could to ensure the least amount of harm possible to civilians and our unit as we assessed the device and what needed to be done. Initial Success, or Total Failure

name: Rep Rick Crawford
tweet: When I got called for different circumstances/situations, we had to determine what kind of device we were dealing with, its potential for harm, and how to secure the area around the device/munition

name: Rep Rick Crawford
tweet: There is no consideration for any other factor when they get the call about a device other than to determine what they are dealing with and what the immediate next steps should be to prevent harm/injuries

name: Rep Rick Crawford
tweet: The slogan we operated by in my unit was “Initial Success or Total Failure” and that is exactly what these individuals think of when they get the call of an IED/or explosive device

name: Rep Rick Crawford
tweet: Quite literally – they are trained to handle a bomb of ANY kind and what to do with that device in the circumstances that they find it in and determine what to do accordingly

name: Rep Rick Crawford
tweet: All of these men and women who are a part of the bomb squads/bomb disposal units who get these calls are some of the best trained and are experts in how to handle a bomb of any kind, in any situation

name: Rep Rick Crawford
